name: STRATS Trust for United States Cellular Corp. Securities, Series 2004-6 STRATS 6.375
summary: STRATS Trust for United States Cellular Corp. Securities, Series 2004-6 STRATS 6.375 is a unit investment trust that holds a portfolio of securities related to United States Cellular Corp., distributing income to its unitholders. The trust was formed in 2004 and has a specific maturity date. It is managed by a financial institution and is a fixed-income investment vehicle.
